item.description:
What's New in 0.0.3

Overhauled note content retrieval to handle embedded images efficiently. Notes with images previously returned ~340KB of base64 data, causing AI agents to fail. Now 16 total tools.

New Tools

  • get_note_text — Plain text content, no HTML or images. Fast and lightweight (~3KB vs ~340KB).
  • get_note_attachments — List image/file metadata (names, dates, count) without loading data.
  • get_note_image — Retrieve images as native MCP image content blocks for multimodal agents.

Improved

  • get_note_content now strips base64 image data (98.4% size reduction), replacing with [embedded image] placeholders while preserving HTML formatting.
  • MCP server now supports mixed text + image content arrays in tool responses.

What's New in 0.0.2

  • 13 Apple Notes tools with branded names
  • Date-based note filtering
  • Sparkle auto-updates
